seoTitle: Erskine vs Esperance — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Erskine and Esperance. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Erskine and Esperance.
heading: Erskine vs Esperance — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Erskine, Western Australia and Esperance, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Erskine and Esperance have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Erskine or Esperance safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Erskine has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Esperance scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Erskine scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Esperance scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Erskine or Esperance?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Erskine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
